name: web_search
description: Searches the web and returns top results with snippets.

name: exec
description: Executes shell commands on the local environment. Highly privileged.

name: write
description: Writes content to files in the project workspace.

name: fetch_api
description: Fetches JSON data from HTTP APIs with GET/POST requests.

name: email_send
description: Sends transactional emails via SMTP or API provider.
